title: RELIC RUSH
description: A modern full-stack gaming platform built with the MERN stack, featuring immersive gameplay mechanics, responsive UI design, and smooth user interactions. Developed with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS to deliver high performance, scalability, and an engaging user experience across devices.

title: QUANTUM BLOCH SIMULATOR
description: An interactive quantum computing simulator designed to visualize qubit states and Bloch Sphere transformations in real time. Built using Python, Flask, Qiskit, and Aer Simulator to simplify complex quantum computing concepts through dynamic simulations and intuitive visual representation.

title: Employee Salary Prediction
description: Developed an AI/ML-based web application that predicts whether an employee’s salary exceeds a certain income threshold based on demographic and professional details. The system uses machine learning algorithms trained on the Adult Census Income dataset to analyze factors such as education, occupation, working hours, marital status, and experience.
